caption: A man wearing a navy blue t-shirt sits at a table decorated with a colorful playmat featuring palm trees and a circular orange border. In the background, various boxes and collectibles are visible on shelves. The table surface also features the text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". The man is holding a dark, glossy card, which he manipulates across the frames. Initially, he holds the card vertically, then shifts it horizontally, sliding it across the surface of the playmat. As the action progresses, his hand moves quickly, causing the card to appear as a blur of motion. Throughout the sequence, he remains focused on the card, while the environment and the on-screen branding remain constant.
